programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, partners will hang by their ankles, they will each hold onto one end of a rope and be lifted over the water. Couples will use their mouths to root around in pies made from wax worms, pigs stomach, fish sauce and duck tongue.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be placed on a 20 foot rope ladder. Contestants play a game to determine quantity of food they will have to eat. Contestant must walk across a 12 inch wide and 60 foot long beam suspended 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant will fire a starter's pistol and run from an attack dog. The contestants will lie in a pit made up of faux rocks and burlap. A 6 and a half inch wide beam is suspended over 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Child contestant will be standing on top of the light tower while the parent is hanging from a helicopter. The parent contestant will be peddling a stationary bicycle. The child is standing on the roof and their parent is navigating through a maze.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on the platform that is suspended. Contestants will lick bugs off of ropes. A glass tube is suspended vertically from a crane with the top sealed and the bottom open and submerges in a pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed on a platform floating in the water, where they will grab a skid of the helicopter. Player is chained between two poles and covered with bees. Contestants will be seated in the front of a car suspended over the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Playmates Super Bowl Special Part 2

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are placed in a box with two plexi-glass walls that will be lifted off the ground. Contestants will be served live snails. Contestants are seated in a car that is in the back of a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants are seated in the front of a car. The driver is blind folded and the passenger must navigate for them. Player is strapped down in a coffin and then covered with 500 Tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from moving helicopter onto a floating platform. Place 60 pink toed tarantulas into torture hat and stay still for 3 minutes. The contestant lies in a plexi-glass tube as water is pumped in.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked in a plexi-glass box that will be hung from a crane, lowered into the water. A contestant bobs into a tank of fluid. One will be driving the main car and the other will be driving the ramp car along a flatbed semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parents my make their way across the ledge of the Universal Orlando while their child stands on their shoulders. The mother son team must retrieve keys. Contestants are seated in a car and must and lock it into position underneath a moving semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each couple is standing on the edge of the roof. Contestant will be sealed into a cage filled with roaches. The cage will be locked on the outside. Contestants are driving behind a flatbed and their opponents are releasing barrels to distract them.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A contestant will be seated in the driver's seat of a limousine, the second contestant will be in the trunk. The contestant will be tied into their seat and to the steering wheel of a automobile.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels must help a troubled young boy who wants to divorce his parents.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels attempt to save a troubled marriage when the neglected wife encounters a man with whom she was once in love.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: At a time when the country is on the brink of peace, Monica brings a group of Northern Ireland teenagers, both Protestant and Catholic, to America to discover the true meaning of peace.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully convince Chief Black Kettle that he should move his starving people to a new reservation. Dr. Mike and Sully are both working on wedding presents for each other.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully have second thoughts about their love for one another as they recall their tumultuous relationship.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: While on his way to resign as Indian Agent, Sully discovers Loren badly injured in the wilderness and must battle his own despair in order to save him. Meanwhile, Dr. Mike is worried about Brian, who is consumed with his efforts to build a flying machine.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully go to Reverend Johnson for an honest discussion regarding their upcoming marriage.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet is denied government assistance, despite having lost a leg and an arm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work as police detectives in a school. Their assignment: to investigate drug selling.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A fisherman's livelihood is in jeopardy because of the amount of time he devotes to his comatose son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A young man learns that the girl he's in love with is pregnant.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When Monica and Andrew throw a surprise party for Tess, there's one problem -- they can't find their guest of honor.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a police detective accidentally shoots an innocent child, a community is thrown into racial turmoil.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: When a tragedy strikes their family, a young girl challenges her father's trust in science and tries to prove that God really does exist.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A Bruce Lee Classic! Lee plays Chen Zhen, a student of Huo Yuanjia, who fights to defend the honor of the Chinese in the face of foreign aggression, and to bring to justice those responsible for his master's death.

programme.title: Kickboxer 2: The Road Back
programme.desc: In this rousing sequel to Kickboxer, Tong Po broods about his defeat at the hands of Kurt Sloan. Po and his managers resort to drastic measures to goad Kurt into the ring for a rematch.

programme.title: Kickboxer 4: The Aggressor
programme.desc: David Sloan is on a mission to free his wife who has been enslaved by an evil world champion, Tong Po. He attempts to gain entry into Po’s savage kingdom by fighting in the tournament of champions where the winner takes all.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Vengeance
programme.desc: A man seeks revenge against a brutal martial-arts fighter.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation
programme.desc: When MMA fighter Kurt Sloane is forced into an underground death match with a 400lb drug-enhanced killer, he seeks help from the legendary Master Durand (Jean-Claude Van Damme) and prison fighter Briggs (Mike Tyson) to survive the fight.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Timecop
programme.desc: Max Walker, an officer for a security agency that regulates time travel, must fend for his life against a shady politician who's intent on changing the past to control the future.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¡Si tienes 30 minutos, entonces tienes tiempo para hacer una comida china rápida para cuatro personas! El chef Spencer Watts hará una fiesta por 30 dólares.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¿A quién no le gusta cenar pizza? El chef Spencer Watts elabora una pizza rápida y sencilla con una ensalada de albahaca fresca.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¡Suelta el menú para comenzar! En tan solo 30 minutos, el chef Spencer Watts nos enseña a cocinar una deliciosa cena tailandesa rápida para cuatro personas.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay viaja a Los Ángeles para inspeccionar Sante La Brea. Descubre a un propietario con problemas financieros que no es respetado por su personal.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Cuando el Chef Ramsay regresa a Finn McCool's, The Olde Stone Mill, The Mixing Bowl, Dillon's, Campania's y Peter's, encuentra restaurantes salvados del borde del desastre.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Mariscos con un Toque Español
programme.desc: El chef Luis “Tigretón” León es un experto en paella y nos muestra el secreto para perfeccionar este plato tradicional español.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Frijoles Mexicanos Tradicionales con desayuno, almuerzo y cena
programme.desc: El chef Luis Valenzuela prepara recetas clásicas de frijoles mexicanos, lo que demuestra que el contorno también puede ser el plato principal.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Platos de Baja
programme.desc: El chef Luis Valenzuela nos lleva a un recorrido culinario por la región de Baja México con sabores dulces y salados desde la playa, a las montañas y de regreso.

programme.title: Cocina latina: Comida Callejera Mexicana
programme.desc: Tendremos tacos mexicanos tradicionales con el chef Luis Valenzuela, quien comparte su secreto de los tacos ahumados y jugosos de pollo.

programme.title: Cocina latina: ¡Chiles, Chiles, Chiles!
programme.desc: Lleva el calor a su cocina con el chef Luis Valenzuela mientras nos muestra la diversidad de chiles con cuatro recetas diferentes.

programme.title: Cocina latina
programme.desc: El aguacate es un alimento básico en la cocina mexicana y el chef Luis Valenzuela nos muestra cómo preparar una salsa de aguacate cremosa, que es el acompañamiento perfecto para las carnitas de cerdo crujientes.

programme.title: Lo que comemos las mujeres
programme.desc: Ximena por fin encontró la rata de campo y una familia ofrece su hogar para que puedan probarla.

programme.title: Lo que comemos las mujeres
programme.desc: El resumen perfecto de la cocina mexicana de distintas regiones, a la modernidad y cocina de autor. Aquí termina el viaje

programme.title: Lo que comemos las mujeres
programme.desc: Karla toma el auto y con el fin de escaparse del mundo urbano, llega a un pueblo para aprender de la cocina más básica.

programme.title: Lo que comemos las mujeres
programme.desc: Karla conoce a Marisela quien la lleva a descubrir la cocina serrana y a la gente más divertida del lugar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay se dirige a Fair Lawn, Nueva Jersey, para encontrarse con un personal de meseros indiferentes que lastima al restaurante italiano Campania's.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Peter's, un restaurante italiano familiar en Babylon, Nueva York. Descubre que el restaurante se está hundiendo debido a su descarado gerente y copropietario.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay viaja a The Olde Stone Mill en Tuckahoe, Nueva York. Aunque el frente ha sido renovado, la cocina todavía sirve comida menos que estelar.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother, Barbara Mullenix, in 2006. She allegedly packed her mother's bloodied corpse in a cardboard box before dumping it in California's Newport Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a popular young man, investigators faced the daunting task of searching for one boat among 1200 others.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It's usually easy to determine how a criminal entered the crime scene. But in this case, it looked as if the killer vanished into thin air — and perhaps he had.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de apenas sobrevivir la noche de apertura del restaurante Hell's Kitchen, los concursantes se preparan para su segundo servicio de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Los chefs se preparan para su tercer servicio de cena, pero la presión de Hell's Kitchen es demasiado para un concursante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: Los concursantes intentan recrear los platos característicos de Gordon para un público exigente de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: Las tensiones surgen en la cocina durante la noche italiana. En el restaurante hay un equipo que quiere ganar jugando sucio.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: En la primera mitad de este especial de dos horas, el chef Ramsay revela el último giro: cada equipo creará su propio menú que consta de tres aperitivos, platos principales y postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día siete
programme.desc: En la parte final de este especial de dos horas, los cinco concursantes restantes descubren que ya no compiten como equipos, sino como individuos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Los cuatro chefs restantes reciben quince minutos y una bandeja con sobras para crear una comida que el chef Ramsay considera servible.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay ordena a los tres concursantes restantes que sirvan una cena completa. ¿Quién creará el mejor plato y quién será enviado a casa sin postre?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los dos finalistas, con la ayuda de los chefs eliminados, compiten en una simulación que pone a prueba sus habilidades para administrar un restaurante.

programme.desc: Ricky is working in Monte Carlo, but Fred goofed and bargained for too little money for the engagement. Lucy and Ethel go to the casino to watch, but when Lucy finds a chip that someone dropped and replaces it on the table, it wins and continues to do so.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty helps Noah with his training but is turned into a baby by Infantor. Noah uses his new skills and an army of babies to save the day.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: It's April Fools' Day on Earth, and Sparky gets a little carried away with his pranks because he wants to be like the host of his favorite 3V show "Prank'd". But then, the host comes to Earth to stop Sparky because he thinks he's trying to steal his show.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: While trying to dig a new private swimming pool in Galactic Guardian headquarters, the Bangoons unearth a rare and valuable opal. Because it can also be dangerous, Betty is tasked with its proper storage.

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus sends Minimus to Earth to kidnap Purrsey so Maximus can have him all to himself, all while Betty and Purrsey are being "brought closer together" by Betty's mom and a clueless TV psychiatrist.

programme.desc: The barrier to the Waking World has been torn and the Nightmare King invades Brooklyn, where the Dream Chasers must make their final stand!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerialtram ... and a salivating T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: While stranded in the jungle during a massive storm, Claire and Simon unknowingly stumble upon a clue to the whereabouts of the treasure sought by Sinjin.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A terrified hybrid dinosaur rampages through the park, causing chaos and creating the cover for Danny and Sinjin as they try to steal the Nedry videotape!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A young park guest accidentally strands himself in the Pteranodon aviary, requiring Owen and a testy Stygimoloch to stage a daring rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen, and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A Dilophosaurus runs loose in the park's hotel, and Owen and Claire must find it before the guests notice ... and before Vic's dino-hunting security team can damage the hotel and the guests!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Vic and Owen find themselves, along with Sinjin, in the middle of a massive dino-fight in the old Jurassic Park Visitor Center!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Harl attempts to prevent Tippy from bringing the fabled "Mars Door" back to Earth. Tippy Dorman, faces the trial of the century after his attempt to take over the world.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's a mad dash by Buster to retrieve his runaway mustache in this fast-paced, zany city-wide chase. Grizzled and Rooky go undercover to root out the criminal mastermind behind a counterfeit pie operation.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Duke gets a high-tech, smart car. He and the temperamental car chase Ice Cream Truck Bandits. The oblivious Ms. Blumfeld turns into a superhero, stopping crimes around the city, as Duke struggles with his orders to arrest her.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's Harl Hubbs Day and Harl decides to help the whole city but quickly discovers he wasn't prepared for Harl mania! Billy's mother, Ann, accepts a junkyard race challenge against the city's street racing legend, Tread Octane.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: We pull back the curtain to see how Firemen Bob and Clemmons retrieve the bizarre requests of Chief Freya during a typical emergency. It's an old west showdown when a new adversary rolls into town.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich organizes a charity as a distraction while he attempts to steal the city deed. Sinclair gathers antiheroes to stop him. Freya is one credit short of graduating from the fire academy and is suspended as Fire Chief.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Mayor Fleck is running for re-election against R E Fendrich who will stop at nothing to win to use his new power to defeat Sinclair once and for all. When Duke loses his memory, Snake Rattler tricks him into believing he's Snake's criminal henchman.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: When Rooky discovers it's Chief Wheeler's birthday, she is determined to make it memorable. During the dedication ceremony of the city's deep-sea vessel to honor Duke, Freya, and Harl, the ship is accidentally set adrift.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: When the mythical ocean monster, the Quacken, is sighted off the coast, famed adventurer Jessica Sharpe vows to capture it. Rooky and Grizzled go undercover aboard the Guardian of the Oceans in search of a lost pirate treasure.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich and his gang learn of Cluster's hidden junkyard treasure. Harl Cluster, Shirley and Tread unite to protect it. Snake and Daisy take advantage of Tread to get him to act as their getaway driver to pull off a heist.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Laval the Lion and Cragger the Crocodile are the best of friends. But when young Cragger becomes king of the Crocodiles, he tries to conquer all the Chi. Former friends become the worst enemies.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: King Cragger’s mischievous sister Crooler uses a mysterious plant to cloud Cragger’s mind. This causes him to cause mayhem at the ceremonial CHI day Speedor races, and he plans a massive attack on the Lion Temple.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger tricks Laval into withholding CHI from the Crocodile tribe. This reignites the hostilities between the Lions and Crocodiles. Laval must frantically escape the wrath of the Crocs and somehow get rid of the CHI before his father finds out.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the various jewels at the World Fair in Los Angeles. Lupin learns from Fujiko that a man named Harry Satler is also after the jewels, so he decides to go see who this guy is. The man he meets is a wizened old man…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Pestered by Fujiko, Lupin has to steal a golden bed that was originally made by Louis XIV for Josephine. He makes a plan with Jigen and Goemon, but the owner of the bed, Morgan, is a formidable opponent who has WWII military experience.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Heike Clan and Minamoto Clan once battled on Devil's Head Island at the inland sea of Seto; Fujiko and Lupin go there to find out about the details behind the legend of the battle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vivian dreams of becoming a star some day, but her auditions are a bust. She thinks of using Lupin to become famous; she makes Lupin engage in thievery, and informs reporters to be at the site to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Catherine rescues Lupin and Jigen, who are pursued by Zenigata as usual. She's an old acquaintance of Jigen's, and provokes Jigen to steal a 140-karat diamond from her own mansion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Wolf and Rose are a cool hitmen duo with the ambition of rising to the top of the hitman business by killing Lupin. They capture Goemon and torture him to confess about Lupin's weaknesses. Lupin learns that Goemon is in danger.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The chief of the police department accused of mismanagement on Lupin's release, hit the prime minister out of anger and was dismissed. Zenigata thinks that Lupin is the only arrest to avenge the chief's death, and starts an operation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The painting "The First Supper" hides clues to an heirloom that Christ received from Virgin Mary. This painting has been kept by the clan of Judah for generations, and a woman named Nova knows where the painting is hidden.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Mona Lisa never leaves the Louvre Museum. Arsène Lupin tried unsuccessfully to steal her and Lupin III wants her for his collection, however, and fireworks ignite between him and Zenigata in charge of security.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Lupin is after is the Golden Treasure Ship at Mount Horai. It's said that the Seven Lucky Gods conferred this treasure, which is shown in public only once a year when the New Year's bell rings at the belfry of Kohoji Temple.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Lupin is tossed to and fro by Fujiko. But a man named Buckingham comes to him and sells him "disguise chewing gum" for 50,000 dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The island of Rabaul has many remains of Japanese casualties of the Pacific War. It's said that Captain Cook's secret treasure is hidden there, worth 1-billion pounds. Lupin and gang are after this treasure but they get attacked!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and gang break into the Bank of Stockholm but as usual, Fujiko tries to take the money all for herself. Lupin goes after her but she gets injured in an avalanche. She confesses to Lupin about the location of her most precious treasure…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends search a month for the pirate Kid's treasure, but they are thwarted by an underground organization called the Red Ghost. Knowing something is afoot, Lupin sends Fujiko and Goemon to investigate.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds a piece of paper in a silk hat, an heirloom of Arsène Lupin. It's information regarding an opal statue of Venus, and since Lupin figures its ownership is his birthright, he heads to Gregoire's castle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata acquires a pie-throwing gun, and is ordered to capture Lupin. Meanwhile, Lupin and Fujiko are discussing Napoleon's treasures. It's said that the key to solving the mystery of their whereabouts lies in a scarf made by Napoleon's assistant…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The young girl Francoise lives near Lupin; she watches Lupin and Fujiko talking, and falls for him. But her father scolds her and tells her to stay away from thieves, but Francoise devises a plan to approach Lupin anyway…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Professor Pancho has devoted his life to solving the problem of food supply. Lupin decides to help them out and invents a rocket that flies on corn fuel, thinking that maybe he and Fujiko will take a trip to the moon…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is blackmailed; Fujiko has been kidnapped, and for ransom he must steal a jeweled crown worth 100 million dollars. Lupin and friends head to the museum where their objective lies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lady Black and Fujiko have a bet. Whoever kills Lupin will get the loser's entire jewelry collection. Lady Black lures Lupin using Fujiko so she could kill him, but why is she so passionate about wanting him dead?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Boss Largo wants Lupin dead; Lupin had just stolen a bundle of the boss's casino profits. But no run of the mill hitman would suffice to wack Lupin. But Largo sees that Lupin is suffering from a toothache, and gets an idea.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin reads the morning paper, which says that Lupin stole a 100-karat diamond that was being used in a musical. He knows he didn't do it, so he asks Fujiko and others, but they too have no idea what it's all about.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The nation of Janaica is troubled with coup d'etats and revolutions, but Lupin, discovering that the president's mansion houses the missing painting "Nude Venus," decides to go scope the joint with Jigen.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/3/19: Trea Turner started off the largest ninth-inning comeback in Nationals history with an RBI double and Kurt Suzuki capped off Washington's 11-10 win against the Mets with a walk-off three-run home run.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 6/29/19 - The Yankees and Red Sox combine for 30 runs, including 12 in the 1st inning, as New York wins in London, 17-13.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 6/30/19 - The Yankees use a nine-run 7th inning to rally past the Red Sox and sweep their two-game set in London.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/09/20 - The Cardinals made postseason history in 2019 with a 10-run 1st inning against the Braves. The historic frame was a Major League record for runs in the 1st inning of a playoff game. St. Louis would win the game, 13-1, clinching a spot in NLCS.

programme.title: MST3K: Earth vs. The Spider
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots get tips on public speaking from the short Speech: Using Your Voice and watch a spider devour a town in Earth vs the Spider (1958)

programme.title: MST3K: The Giant Spider Invasion
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots suffer through The Giant Spider Invasion (1975).

programme.title: MST3K: Master Ninja I
programme.desc: The crew watch a ninja and a drifter save an airport from thugs in "Master Ninja I" while building a model muscle car and experimenting with their ninja skills.

programme.title: MST3K: Master Ninja II
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots endure two equally bad episodes from the failed action seriesThe Master(1984).

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Stay safe with this informative short about occupational hazards.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: The first installment of the 1939 serial starring Bela Lugosi.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Mitchell
programme.desc: The trio sit through a dreary Joe Don Baker disasterpiece as Gypsy tries to find a way to save Joel from being killed by the Mads.

programme.title: MST3K: Pod People
programme.desc: A child adopts a large egg which hatches into a mischievous alien, while a group of pop musicians on a wilderness vacation runs into trouble.

programme.title: MST3K: Stranded In Space
programme.desc: The gang on the SoL have a gag-weapon war with the Mads and watch an unsuccessful TV pilot about an astronaut stuck on an Earth-like planet where ;perfect order; rules.

programme.desc: John explodes when his relationship with Julia takes a turn. Asaf and Francesca's status is in question when a trip to the Boom Boom Room fails. Kaylen drops a bomb about her relationship with Gio that leaves the house shocked.

programme.title: Are You The One?

programme.title: Ex on The Beach

programme.title: Ex on The Beach

programme.title: Ex on The Beach

programme.desc: Sparks fly when DJ Pauly D and Vinny invite their ex-girlfriends to live and work with them in Las Vegas. But will old wounds and the temptations of Sin City make finding love a losing bet?

programme.desc: Kelsey spreads a rumor about Juliette that makes their friendship worse. Chloe tries to make amends with Kelsey and Madisson. Brandon wants Camilla back. Juliette faces jealousy issues when Sam's friend shakes things up.

programme.title: Siesta Key

programme.title: True Life Crime
programme.desc: Kenneka Jenkins vanished from a party at a hotel in Chicago after going on Facebook. 24 hours later, her body was found inside a freezer in the hotel's basement. The investigation incited a firestorm as residents joined sleuths to find out what happened.

programme.title: True Life Crime
programme.desc: Police discover a car belonging to Sarah Stern on a bridge, but she was nowhere to be found. Police suspected suicide, but why then would she withdraw thousands of dollars days before? A tip reveals a truth so horrifying it could be a movie plot.

programme.title: True Life Crime
programme.desc: Kedarie Johnson, a gender fluid teen, begins walking home from a friend's house. Despite expressing fear that they were being followed, Kedarie makes the trip alone. Later that night, shots ring out and Kedarie's body is soon discovered.

programme.title: True Life Crime
programme.desc: Jerika Binks vanished while out on a Sunday morning run in Utah. Her family and authorities searched for a year but found no trace. Did she run away from her sober-living facility, or was she another tragic victim of violence against female runners?

programme.title: True Life Crime
programme.desc: 16-year-old Mujey Dumbuya left her home to catch the bus and vanished. Mujey was classified as a runaway by authorities. Days later, her body was found in a wooded area 45 miles from her home.

programme.title: True Life Crime
programme.desc: Lesandro "Junior" Guzman-Feliz was killed by gang members brandishing machetes. The murder was recorded by security cameras and bystanders. The violent nature of the crime caused the story to go viral on social media seeking #justiceforjunior.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Entra de sorpresa el último ex y todos quedan en shock. La fiesta de compromiso cierra con broche de oro en la Master Suite. Unos videos le abren los ojos a varios y, en la fiesta final, recuerdan los mejores momentos de las vacaciones.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban y Aylin comienzan un romance. La llegada del nuevo EX sorprende a todos y la Tablet los manda a una cita de tres. La Sala Tornado pone las cartas sobre la mesa. Brandon toma una decisión importante.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La tensión parece calmarse tras la reconciliación entre Diana y Brandon. Camilo y David tienen una plática sincera y Kelly aclara sus intenciones con Karen. Daphne saca su furia y arremte contra Aylin.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Dos nuevos EX llegan a la Villa y se desatan los celos. Diana deja las cosas claras con Brandon en la Love Suite. Todos disfrutan de un día fuera de la Villa y el alcohol les ayuda a encararse.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los shores comienzan el día paseo en barco donde las mexicanas dejan claro la antipatía hacia la millonaria italiana. Tras un regreso, los chicos disfrutan en un club de playa de una tarde de sol y bellezas

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Comienza la despedida de Mykonos por todo lo alto. Primera parada en un club de playa donde Elettra demuestra a Abraham que es algo posesiva. Tras una cena típica griega, bailes incluidos, terminan la noche de Mykonos en una discoteca

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Después de una intensa mañana de trabajo en el gimnasio, Arantxa comunica a sus amigos que lo está pasando mal en su relación con Igor. El resto del día lo pasan conociendo Madrid, paseando y en un bus turístico

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Haeixa, Julienne y Abelha dan la bienvenida a Bruno. Julienne y él disfrutan de una cita en plan romántico. Mary M da una calurosa bienvenida al novato Bruno y los dos terminan la noche besándose.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: La actividad final hace arder a la multitud y la casa tiembla con una pelea entre Haeixa, Let y JV. El último día, todos disfrutan de un súper brunch, con muchas lágrimas. Cierran la temporada sacudiendo botines en el programa de Ryan Castro.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.desc: Era la Edad Oscura ... y desde el frío Mar del Norte explotó una civilización marítima que asaltó y aterrorizó a Europa ... eran los Vikingos. Ellos son responsables de crear una vasta red comercial.

programme.title: Miradas sin filtro
programme.desc: Dentro de la sierra, la cultura Pame resguarda una identidad irrepetible.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: El futuro pinta bien para Gold & Silver con una pintura de Marc Chagall que le llama la atención a Rick. ¿Obtendrá esta obra maestra o acabará con un trato descolorido? Más tarde, Rick intenta comprar un anillo de la Serie Mundial de los Boston Red Sox.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick intenta conseguir una tarjeta autografiada del presidente Abraham Lincoln que no imagina no tener. Corey y Chum piensan en ofrecer mucho dinero por el mango de un driver de golf diseñado para el presidente Bill Clinton.

programme.title: Tastil, la majestuosa y misteriosa
programme.desc: Muy cerca de la cordillera de Los Andes, a casi 4.000 metros de altura, existió la majestuosa ciudad de TASTIL. Increíblemente, fue abandonada, y no se sabe por qué.

programme.title: Poder aéreo
programme.desc: Utilizando temas como la velocidad, el tamaño y el exceso, cada episodio abarca el mar, el ferrocarril, la tierra y el aire.

programme.title: Secretos de los museos: Florencia
programme.desc: Dentro de la Galería Uffizi de Florencia.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El nacimiento y la muerte son etapas naturales de la vida. Sin embargo, algunas veces la muerte no es el capítulo final. A menudo, espíritus inquietos deambulan por la tierra buscando atormentar con su furia eterna a los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ayudar a los amigos a sobrellevar los tiempos difíciles puede ser agotador, en especial cuando esa dificultad tiene que ver con una enfermedad que pone en peligro la vida.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuenta la leyenda que un "fantasma" empujará a cualquiera que se atreva a sentarse en lo alto del mausoleo en el cementerio más antiguo de Wisconsin. Los compañeros de secundaria Nick, Krystian y Jon prueban esta teoría en la noche de Halloween.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Springfield, estado de Illinois, el Lake Club es un monumento a una época pasada: un salón de baile donde multitud de personas alguna vez prosperaron, acompañados de los sonidos del jazz clásico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los espiritistas algunas veces hablan sobre cierta región de la existencia donde los espíritus vagan libres de cuerpos materiales, y ellos la llaman “la otra vida”. En las costas de West Bay Lake, estado de Wisconsin.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La ciencia moderna nos afirma que, en el nivel más simple, el mundo material no es más que energía y que todos estamos conectados de forma física con el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ron y Nancy están convencidos de que su nuevo hogar es demasiado bueno para ser verdad: la histórica casa Baltimore se adapta de forma ideal a su presupuesto, y además, es tan grande como para alojar a su gran familia.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que los fantasmas son espíritus humanos que deben lidiar con asuntos aún pendientes y que quizás puedan necesitar la ayuda de los vivos con el fin de encontrar la paz entre los muertos.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: La mayor parte de Laponia se encuentra en Noruega, y es en Karasjok donde los sámi tienen su propio parlamento. La identidad Sámi respeta las costumbres ancestrales y está en armonía con el medio ambiente.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: En este episodio, podemos observar las tácticas creativas que usan los animales para encontrar a las mejores parejas y lograr conquistarlas.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: Con una extensión de 1.500 millas desde las gélidas aguas de Cape Point hasta los mares subtropicales de Kwazulu - Natal, la costa africana del Cabo es un ecosistema único.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Este documental de la fauna silvestre inspecciona una típica sabana de Sudáfrica y la compleja red de vida que existe en su hábitat.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Descubre el mítico archipiélago de las Cícladas del Sur. Visite la isla de Amorgos, donde se filmó la película de culto "The Big Blue", Santorini, que está cubierta de lava negra enfriada, y Naxos, la isla de Dionisio.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Kimimaro succeeds in shattering Gaara’s protective sand shield and attacks Gaara. Naruto finally catches up to Sasuke…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: With the Curse Mark covering half his body, Sasuke is no longer the Sasuke of old. Naruto charges at this new Sasuke who has turned his back on his closest comrades.

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln's social standing is at stake when his four-year-old sister is put into his fifth grade class; the children grow tired of their family van falling apart, so they decide to try to trick Dad into buying a cool, new van.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola and Lana try out for Bluebell Scouts, but discover one of them might be more suited for it; when Lincoln and Clyde think Bobby is cheating on Lori, they follow him around town gathering evidence.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Dad gets upset with the children for never locking the front door, they decide to take home security to the next level; when Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos, he and Clyde attempt to recreate them before his memory fades.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities; when Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are put in jeopardy when they only have one day to complete their list; Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests do not like what she has planned.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the children make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza; Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln does not trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis; when Lana brings home a new pet, whom the children adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When the children hear Lily curse, they become worried that they have been a bad influence on her; when a love letter addressed to L. Loud arrives, the family tries to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne and Bobby visit their crazy extended family, Bobby fits in great, but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Afraid they will be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos; seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, tries to cure his post-breakup blues; tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Loud family believe that they are safe from pranks on April Fool's Day because prankster Luan is away at camp; when the children discover that their father is not at his old job anymore, they begin to worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that "ARGGH!" is coming to town; Lori moves to the garage.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde is desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, so he enlists Leni's help; worried that their parents are hurting their health from not being active, the children encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After meeting an impressive family, the Loud parents worry that their children are not doing enough to ensure successful futures; tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The sisters enlist Lincoln, the "Master of Convincing," to teach them how to ask their parents for money; when Lisa's report card reveals that she has failed social skills, she must make a friend in order to bring up her grade.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up; knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the children decide not to tell her about their mother's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on "Legends of the Hidden Temple" and cannot wait to for a whole day of father-and-son bonding; Lincoln wants to go to the mall but has to watch his younger sisters, so he decides to take them to the mall.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library, but Lola refuses to participate; when Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: For Halloween, Lincoln and Clyde have scoped out a fancy neighborhood to make their dreams of scoring full-size candy bars a reality; Lucy is putting on a haunted maze and the younger girls scheme to get maximum candy.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The children give Lily an old singing toy from the attic to help her stop crying, but it quickly drives them crazy; the kids try to convince Dad of the wonders of modern technology after he declares war on their electronic devices.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: During a road trip to their vacation destination, everything that can go wrong for the family does.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln has a plan for introducing himself to a new girl; Pop Pop introduces his new girlfriend to the family; she seems great until she starts showing up unannounced.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luna learns Chunk was like her in high school and worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic; Lincoln wages war after his food is filched from the refrigerator.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photograph gets more "likes" on social media than Lori's, she tries to one-up her; thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on Lola's home-schooling.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city, where Lori struggles to be a city girl; Lincoln finds that Ronnie Anne has changed; the family uses stunt doubles in its plan to avoid Luan's April Fool's Day pranking.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lynn desperately wants to win a basketball championship but gets drafted onto a terrible team; Mom and Dad decide to build a secret bathroom after they become sick of waiting their turn in line.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lucy becomes annoyed when Lori and Leni start watching her vampire show because of a cute new character; Mom gets community service for racking up tickets.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up in an effort to make gym class better; Luan teaches Lucy how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family; Lori and Bobby worry that long-distance dating is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy; Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges, and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party; the kids worry that Leni is too weak and they try to teach her how to be more aggressive.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time; Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: El amor de Carl por los juguetes lo atrapa en una carrera de crítico de juguetes. El arte de Frida recibe una mala crítica, por lo que los niños intentan organizar una nueva subasta para levantarle el ánimo.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Los chicos intentan romper el récord local quedándose toda la noche en el cementerio. Un pollo embrujado no deja en paz a la familia.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y sus primos intentan ganar un viaje alrededor del mundo para María. Carlota descubre que no sabe cortar el pelo y decide formarse con el maestro peluquero: CJ.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Un grupo de pajaritos cree que Sergio es su mamá. Ronnie Anne y Sid ayudan a Casey a manejar el camión de comida de su familia en un concierto de Yoon Kwan.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Cuando mamá Lupe viene de visita, la abuela intenta que la familia aprenda sobre cultura. Adelaide y Carl tienen una ventura en a ruta del señor Chang y deberán trabajar juntos para salvar el día.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Después de haber discutido con Abuelo, Bobby empieza a trabajar para el señor Hong con el propósito de poner en práctica sus nuevas ideas para los negocios. Carl y Adelaide son una grave amenaza para la piyamada de Ronnie, Anne y Sid.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: El famoso psíquico Ernesto Estrella considera que Great Lakes City es de mala suerte y la Abuela le cree.

programme.desc: Deon believes that Cassandra has been having sex with Josh and that she may be pregnant with his child! Next, Shawn believes his wife, Jamie, cheated on him with his brother. Jamie blacked out during a night of drinking and does not remember.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
programme.desc: On today's Steve Wilkos, will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone's men were faithful? Or will it reveal some more sinister results?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Avonte was diagnosed with cancer that had him hospitalized for almost a year. His aunt, Terceira, started a fundraiser to help. But now Avonte and his mother are saying that they never received any money and they believe that Terceira kept it.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Beth and Eric have been dating for a year. But Eric began sleeping with Beth's sister with Beth's permission! Beth now says she only gave it because she was scared of losing Eric. Both women claim to love Eric and want him for their own.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Toby says his lover has left him for a jailbird and he needs Jerry's help to get her back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a shocking person!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Stephanie is married and pregnant, but she's not sure if the father is her husband or her boyfriend! Her husband is no hero either because he has a girlfriend too. These guests and others are here to demand a divorce to be with their latest loves.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mistie says that her man has been disloyal, but never guessed her best friend! Jose's 2 boyfriends don't know that they've been sharing him. Antjuan hates that his girlfriend strips for a living.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Psychic Lover" is a phony psychic who convinces women that their boyfriends are cheating so that he can then start having affairs with them. Later Marcus cheated on his girlfriend, Latoria, with her mother!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Felicia is here to confront her boyfriend and her mother who have been sleeping together for months! Next Susan must come clean to her boyfriend and tell him she's working the corner again!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Amy is here to confront her husband, Fury's, ex-mistress, Shauna, for continuing to butt into their lives. Shauna says she loves Fury but admits that she's been sleeping with her cousin, Becky! Then Becky reveals to all that she slept with Fury!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tonya wants to tell her man that she's pregnant and cheating with her transsexual roommate, Gina! Mike has been sleeping with his fiancé’s cousin for a year! Then, Jimmy has a pregnant fiancé AND girlfriend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: In this special episode, a group of select viewers will duke it out with some of Jerry’s outrageously memorable guests!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jamie has been cheating on her boyfriend with a woman! Then, Steve believes his wife’s been cheating with another man. Next LaToya's here to cause a family feud. She's been cheating with her girlfriend's sister!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sheene’s got a secret to reveal to Derrick that may threaten their relationship. Tabitha thinks her man TJ might be cheating again. Plus, Xeo and James are going head to head for the same woman.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 16-year-old Desire ran away from home about a month ago. Since then the only contact she's had with her mother are random text messages telling her that she's still alive. Desire says she always risked abuse and could never confide in her mother.
